name: neural-brain
description: AI Cognitive Neural Network — a living-brain visualization powered by the Claude API

scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
